original: “The ancient Hawaiians were astronomers,” wrote Queen Liliuokalani, Hawaii’s last reigning monarch, in 1897.
translation_literal: “古代夏威夷人是天文学家，”夏威夷最后一位在位君主莉莉乌奥卡拉尼女王在 1897 年写道。

chunks.chinese: 古代夏威夷人是天文学家
夏威夷最后一位在位君主
chunks.relation: 解释 Queen Liliuokalani 的身份

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 直接引语 + wrote + 作者
sentence_patterns.explanation: wrote Queen... 是倒置的引语来源，真正引语内容在前面。
Hawaii’s last reigning monarch 解释 Queen Liliuokalani 的身份。

original: Star watchers were among the most esteemed members of Hawaiian society.
translation_literal: 观星者曾是夏威夷社会中最受尊敬的成员之一。

chunks.english: among the most esteemed members of Hawaiian society
chunks.chinese: 在夏威夷社会中最受尊敬的成员之中

original: Sadly, all is not well with astronomy in Hawaii today.
translation_literal: 令人遗憾的是，今天夏威夷的天文学并非一切顺利。

chunks.english: well with astronomy in Hawaii today
chunks.chinese: 今天夏威夷天文学方面顺利的
chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

original: Protests have erupted over construction of the Thirty Meter Telescope (TMT), a giant observatory that promises to revolutionize humanity’s view of the cosmos.
translation_literal: 围绕三十米望远镜的建造，抗议已经爆发；这是一座巨大的天文台，它有望彻底改变人类对宇宙的看法。

chunks.english: over construction of the Thirty Meter Telescope (TMT)
chunks.chinese: 围绕三十米望远镜的建造
chunks.relation: 说明 protests 爆发的缘由

chunks.english: a giant observatory that promises to revolutionize humanity’s view of the cosmos
chunks.chinese: 一座有望彻底改变人类宇宙观的巨大天文台
chunks.relation: 解释 the Thirty Meter Telescope

chunks.english: that promises to revolutionize humanity’s view of the cosmos
chunks.chinese: 有望彻底改变人类对宇宙的看法的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 专有名词 + 同位语 + 定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: a giant observatory 解释 TMT，that 从句继续说明 observatory 的作用。

original: At issue is the TMT’s planned location on Mauna Kea, a dormant volcano worshiped by some Hawaiians as the piko, that connects the Hawaiian Islands to the heavens.
translation_literal: 争议的焦点是三十米望远镜计划设在莫纳克亚山的位置，莫纳克亚是一座休眠火山，一些夏威夷人把它作为 piko 崇拜，认为它把夏威夷群岛与天堂连接起来。

chunks.english: At issue is the TMT’s planned location on Mauna Kea
chunks.chinese: 处于争议中的是 TMT 在莫纳克亚山的计划位置

chunks.english: the TMT’s planned location on Mauna Kea
chunks.chinese: TMT 在莫纳克亚山的计划位置

chunks.english: a dormant volcano worshiped by some Hawaiians as the piko
chunks.chinese: 一座被一些夏威夷人作为 piko 崇拜的休眠火山

chunks.english: worshiped by some Hawaiians as the piko
chunks.chinese: 被一些夏威夷人作为 piko 崇拜的

chunks.english: that connects the Hawaiian Islands to the heavens
chunks.chinese: 把夏威夷群岛与天堂连接起来的
chunks.relation: 修饰 piko/volcano 这一文化意义
that 定语从句内部主语
that 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: the Hawaiian Islands to the heavens
chunks.relation: 作 connects 的宾语/方向

sentence_patterns.explanation: 表语 At issue 位于句首，正常语序是 the planned location is at issue。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 地名 + 同位语 + 定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: a dormant volcano 解释 Mauna Kea，后面从句说明其宗教文化意义。

original: But Mauna Kea is also home to some of the world’s most powerful telescopes.
translation_literal: 但是莫纳克亚山也是世界上一些最强大望远镜的所在地。

chunks.english: home to some of the world’s most powerful telescopes
chunks.chinese: 世界上一些最强大望远镜的所在地

original: Rested in the Pacific Ocean, Mauna Kea’s peak rises above the bulk of our planet’s dense atmosphere, where conditions allow telescopes to obtain images of unsurpassed clarity.
translation_literal: 坐落在太平洋中，莫纳克亚山峰高出我们星球浓密大气层的主体，在那里，条件允许望远镜获得清晰度无与伦比的图像。

chunks.relation: 说明 Mauna Kea 的地理位置

chunks.english: above the bulk of our planet’s dense atmosphere
chunks.chinese: 高出我们星球浓密大气层的主体

chunks.english: where conditions allow telescopes to obtain images of unsurpassed clarity
chunks.chinese: 在那里，条件允许望远镜获得清晰度无与伦比的图像

chunks.english: to obtain images of unsurpassed clarity
chunks.chinese: 获得清晰度无与伦比的图像
chunks.relation: 补充说明 telescopes 能做什么

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 非谓语开头 + 主句 + where 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 句首 Rested... 是地点背景，where 从句修饰高海拔观测条件。

original: Opposition to telescopes on Mauna Kea is nothing new.
translation_literal: 对莫纳克亚山上望远镜的反对并不是什么新鲜事。

chunks.english: Opposition to telescopes on Mauna Kea
chunks.chinese: 对莫纳克亚山上望远镜的反对

original: A small but vocal group of Hawaiians and environmentalists have long viewed their presence as disrespect for sacred land and a painful reminder of the occupation of what was once a sovereign nation.
translation_literal: 一小群但声音很大的夏威夷人和环保人士长期以来把它们的存在看作对神圣土地的不尊重，以及对曾经是主权国家的地方被占领的痛苦提醒。

chunks.english: A small but vocal group of Hawaiians and environmentalists
chunks.chinese: 一小群但声音很大的夏威夷人和环保人士

chunks.relation: 作 viewed 的宾语，指 telescopes 的存在

chunks.english: as disrespect for sacred land and a painful reminder of the occupation of what was once a sovereign nation
chunks.chinese: 看作对神圣土地的不尊重，以及对曾经是主权国家的地方被占领的痛苦提醒
chunks.relation: 补充说明 their presence 被看作什么

chunks.english: a painful reminder of the occupation of what was once a sovereign nation
chunks.chinese: 对曾经是主权国家的地方被占领的痛苦提醒

chunks.english: what was once a sovereign nation
chunks.chinese: 曾经是一个主权国家的地方
chunks.relation: 作 occupation of 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: view A as B and C
sentence_patterns.explanation: as 后两个宾补并列，说明反对者眼中望远镜存在的两层含义。

original: Some blame for the current controversy belongs to astronomers.
translation_literal: 当前争议的一部分责任属于天文学家。

chunks.english: Some blame for the current controversy
chunks.chinese: 当前争议的一部分责任

chunks.relation: 作 belongs to 的宾语

original: In their eagerness to build bigger telescopes, they forgot that science is not the only way of understanding the world.
translation_literal: 在他们急于建造更大望远镜的过程中，他们忘记了科学不是理解世界的唯一方式。

chunks.english: In their eagerness to build bigger telescopes
chunks.chinese: 在他们急于建造更大望远镜的过程中

chunks.english: that science is not the only way of understanding the world
chunks.chinese: 科学不是理解世界的唯一方式

chunks.english: the only way of understanding the world
chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

original: They did not always prioritize the protection of Mauna Kea’s fragile ecosystems or its holiness to the islands’ inhabitants.
translation_literal: 他们并不总是优先考虑保护莫纳克亚脆弱的生态系统，或保护它对群岛居民而言的神圣性。

chunks.english: the protection of Mauna Kea’s fragile ecosystems or its holiness to the islands’ inhabitants
chunks.chinese: 保护莫纳克亚脆弱的生态系统，或保护它对群岛居民而言的神圣性

chunks.english: the protection of Mauna Kea’s fragile ecosystems
chunks.chinese: 保护莫纳克亚脆弱的生态系统

chunks.english: its holiness to the islands’ inhabitants
chunks.chinese: 它对群岛居民而言的神圣性

sentence_patterns.explanation: prioritize 的宾语由两个抽象名词短语并列构成。

original: Hawaiian culture is not a relic of the past; it is a living culture undergoing a renaissance today.
translation_literal: 夏威夷文化不是过去的遗物；它是一种今天正在经历复兴的活文化。

chunks.english: Hawaiian culture is not a relic of the past
chunks.chinese: 夏威夷文化不是过去的遗物

chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

chunks.english: it is a living culture undergoing a renaissance today
chunks.chinese: 它是一种今天正在经历复兴的活文化
chunks.relation: 第二分句，与前一分句对照

chunks.english: a living culture undergoing a renaissance today
chunks.chinese: 一种今天正在经历复兴的活文化

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A is not B; it is C
sentence_patterns.explanation: 分号连接两个对照分句，强调 Hawaiian culture 不是遗物而是活文化。

original: Yet science has a cultural history, too, with roots going back to the dawn of civilization.
translation_literal: 然而，科学也有一段文化历史，其根源可以追溯到文明的开端。

chunks.relation: 强调 science 也有文化历史

chunks.english: with roots going back to the dawn of civilization
chunks.chinese: 其根源可以追溯到文明的开端
chunks.relation: 补充说明 cultural history 的来源

sentence_patterns.explanation: too 表明 science 和 Hawaiian culture 一样也有文化历史。

original: The same curiosity to find what lies beyond the horizon that first brought early Polynesians to Hawaii’s shores inspires astronomers today to explore the heavens.
translation_literal: 同样一种寻找地平线之外存在什么的好奇心，最初把早期波利尼西亚人带到夏威夷海岸，今天也激励天文学家探索天空。

chunks.english: The same curiosity to find what lies beyond the horizon that first brought early Polynesians to Hawaii’s shores
chunks.chinese: 同样一种寻找地平线之外存在什么的好奇心，最初把早期波利尼西亚人带到夏威夷海岸

chunks.english: to find what lies beyond the horizon
chunks.chinese: 去寻找地平线之外存在什么的

chunks.english: that first brought early Polynesians to Hawaii’s shores
chunks.chinese: 最初把早期波利尼西亚人带到夏威夷海岸的

chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部主语
that 定语从句内部谓语
补充说明激励天文学家做什么

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 长主语 + 谓语 + 宾语补足语
sentence_patterns.explanation: 主语中嵌入 what 宾语从句和 that 定语从句，真正主句谓语是 inspires。

original: Calls to disassemble all telescopes on Mauna Kea or to ban future development there ignore the reality that astronomy and Hawaiian culture both seek to answer big questions about who we are, where we come from and where we are going.
translation_literal: 要求拆除莫纳克亚山上所有望远镜或禁止那里未来开发的呼声，忽视了这样一个现实：天文学和夏威夷文化都试图回答关于我们是谁、我们来自哪里以及我们将去向何方的大问题。

chunks.english: Calls to disassemble all telescopes on Mauna Kea or to ban future development there
chunks.chinese: 要求拆除莫纳克亚山上所有望远镜或禁止那里未来开发的呼声

chunks.english: to disassemble all telescopes on Mauna Kea
chunks.chinese: 拆除莫纳克亚山上所有望远镜

chunks.english: that astronomy and Hawaiian culture both seek to answer big questions about who we are, where we come from and where we are going
chunks.chinese: 天文学和夏威夷文化都试图回答关于我们是谁、我们来自哪里以及我们将去向何方的大问题
chunks.relation: 解释 reality 的具体内容

chunks.english: big questions about who we are, where we come from and where we are going
chunks.chinese: 关于我们是谁、我们来自哪里以及我们将去向何方的大问题

chunks.english: who we are / where we come from / where we are going
chunks.chinese: 我们是谁 / 我们来自哪里 / 我们将去向何方

chunks.relation: who we are 内部谓语
第一个并列问题从句 who we are 的内部主语
第二、第三并列问题从句 where we come from / where we are going 的共同主语
后两个并列问题从句的谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 reality 的具体内容。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: to disassemble... or to ban...; who/where/where
sentence_patterns.explanation: 主语中两个呼声并列，句尾三个大问题并列。

original: Perhaps that is why we explore the starry skies, as if answering a primal calling to know ourselves and our true ancestral homes.
translation_literal: 也许这就是为什么我们探索星空，好像是在回应一种原始召唤，去认识我们自己和我们真正的祖先家园。

chunks.english: why we explore the starry skies
as if answering a primal calling to know ourselves and our true ancestral homes
chunks.chinese: 好像是在回应一种原始召唤，去认识我们自己和我们真正的祖先家园
chunks.relation: 说明 explore 的方式/意义
as if 后省略 we were

chunks.english: to know ourselves and our true ancestral homes
chunks.chinese: 去认识我们自己和我们真正的祖先家园的

sentence_patterns.explanation: as if answering... 省略了 we were，表示仿佛在回应召唤。

original: The astronomy community is making compromises to change its use of Mauna Kea.
translation_literal: 天文学界正在作出妥协，以改变其对莫纳克亚山的使用。

chunks.english: to change its use of Mauna Kea
chunks.chinese: 以改变其对莫纳克亚山的使用
chunks.relation: 说明 making compromises 的目的

original: The TMT site was chosen to minimize the telescope’s visibility around the island and to avoid archaeological and environmental impact.
translation_literal: TMT 的选址是为了尽量减少望远镜在岛上的可见度，并避免考古和环境影响。

chunks.english: to minimize the telescope’s visibility around the island and to avoid archaeological and environmental impact
chunks.chinese: 为了尽量减少望远镜在岛上的可见度，并避免考古和环境影响
chunks.relation: 说明 was chosen 的目的

chunks.english: to minimize the telescope’s visibility around the island
chunks.chinese: 尽量减少望远镜在岛上的可见度

chunks.english: to avoid archaeological and environmental impact

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: to do A and to do B
sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个不定式目的并列，说明选址考虑。

original: To limit the number of telescopes on Mauna Kea, old ones will be removed at the end of their lifetimes and their sites returned to a natural state.
translation_literal: 为了限制莫纳克亚山上望远镜的数量，旧望远镜将在其寿命结束时被移走，它们的场址也将恢复到自然状态。

chunks.english: To limit the number of telescopes on Mauna Kea
chunks.chinese: 为了限制莫纳克亚山上望远镜的数量

chunks.english: old ones will be removed at the end of their lifetimes
chunks.chinese: 旧望远镜将在其寿命结束时被移走

chunks.english: at the end of their lifetimes
their sites returned to a natural state
chunks.chinese: 它们的场址恢复到自然状态
chunks.relation: 第二分句，省略 will be
第二分句省略 will be 后的谓语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A will be removed and B returned
sentence_patterns.explanation: 第二个并列分句省略 will be，完整为 their sites will be returned。

original: There is no reason why everyone cannot be welcomed on Mauna Kea to embrace their cultural heritage and to study the stars.
translation_literal: 没有理由不能欢迎所有人来到莫纳克亚山，去拥抱他们的文化遗产并研究星星。

chunks.english: why everyone cannot be welcomed on Mauna Kea to embrace their cultural heritage and to study the stars
chunks.chinese: 为什么不能欢迎所有人来到莫纳克亚山去拥抱文化遗产并研究星星
去拥抱他们的文化遗产

sentence_patterns.explanation: 句末两个不定式并列，说明欢迎所有人上山的两种目的。
